review_reason: Phase 2 covering lemma proof blocked - connecting DF axiom to MCS-level covering property is non-trivial and may require new theoretical infrastructure

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 completed (DF infrastructure analysis). Phase 2 blocked: the covering lemma requires proving forward witness is the immediate successor, but Lindenbaum non-uniqueness and stage-bounding failure make this non-trivial.

errors.message: Covering lemma df_frame_condition_canonical requires showing forward witness is minimal among successors. Current infrastructure lacks lemmas connecting DF axiom presence to MCS construction.
errors.recommendation: Develop new theoretical infrastructure: (1) Lemmas about Lindenbaum extension ordering under DF, or (2) Alternative approach defining SuccOrder without LocallyFiniteOrder

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 1 analysis complete. Identified circular dependency in current code. Phase 2 covering lemma proof blocked - requires connecting DF semantics to MCS-level covering. Estimated 8-15 hours additional work.
